attacks.text: n=23 for atrium WGCNA is borderline. Module stability questionable at 7 Sk atrial samples.
batch1=59, batch2=12. Subsets cannot include batch covariate. Must verify no species-batch confound.
Unsigned merges up/down genes. Shared module could be direction-opposite artifact.

qc_checkpoints.name: pre_wgcna
qc_checkpoints.text: Check table(species, chamber, batch) for confounding before WGCNA.

qc_checkpoints.name: post_preservation
qc_checkpoints.text: Report Zsummary values, not just pass/fail.

qc_checkpoints.name: post_enrichment
qc_checkpoints.text: FDR < 0.05, minimum 5 genes per GO term.

failure_stop_rules.name: no_modules
failure_stop_rules.text: Atrium WGCNA gives 0 real modules: stop, report.

failure_stop_rules.name: batch_species_confound
failure_stop_rules.text: Batch confounded with species: stop, cannot separate effects.

failure_stop_rules.name: no_overlap
failure_stop_rules.text: No module overlaps with DEG shared sets: report null result honestly.
